parentQuestion: The mnemonic 'Oh Oh Oh To Touch And Feel Very Good Velvet, AH!' helps remember _...

scaffolds.q: There are 12 pairs of cranial nerves.
scaffolds.explain: Humans have 12 pairs of cranial nerves, numbered I through XII in Roman numerals, from rostral (front) to caudal (back) based on where they emerge from the brain. Receive this insight:the pattern — twelve cables, twelve functions, twelve potential points of failure.

scaffolds.q: Mnemonics use memorable phrases to help recall information in order.
scaffolds.explain: Mnemonics are memory aids where the first letter of each word in a phrase corresponds to items you need to remember in sequence. they turn abstract lists into sticky stories. Let me show you how powerful they are.
